faction.name: Erwachen
faction.lore: Es wird erzählt, die Wogen trügen die Geister der Meere. Das Wasser bebt dem Untergang der Linien entgegen. In den Strömen erwacht die Macht, die Macht des Erwachens beginnt.

spell.name: Splitter
spell.effect: Split Erwachen into 1 Flusswache and 3 Gezeitensucher. Place up to 3 Reserve Dice as Flusswache and Gezeitensucher in line in the Warlands (max 1 per field).

passives.name: Stufe 1 Flusswurf
passives.effect: Exile 1 Reserve Die and use 10. Draw 1 Spell card or search Richwebewurf for creatures. Raise 1 Spell die or befriende creature by 1 level.

spell.name: Außer Dem Nebel
spell.effect: Except Dem Nebel an adjacent creature: Carry out standard movement with Ohtilia, falls possible.

spell.name: Geister erwebe
spell.effect: Spawn 1 Flusswache and 1 Gezeitensucher in the Warlands, vertical adjacent. Exile 1 Reserve Die as Flusswache and 1 as Gezeitensucher.

passives.name: Schicksalsweberin
passives.effect: Exile 1 Reserve Die and use 2. Raise 1 friendly creature by 1 level or raise 1 Machtstuf.

creatures.name: Flusswache
creatures.movement: Bring friendly creature here by 1 umliegend field.

passives.name: Wellenritt
passives.effect: Bring befreundete Kreatur here by up to 1 umliegend field or up to 3 angrenzend fields.

creatures.name: Traumbringer
creatures.movement: Wasserperde moves in any direction up to 3 fields.

passives.name: Tieferauchen
passives.effect: When Traumbringer is defeated, exhale 2. Opponent's adjacent creatures cannot use Zauberaktionen.

passives.name: Wahrebecher Angriffsaktion
passives.effect: Raise Machtstuf of Gezeitensucher of sum all own Gezeitensucher in Warlands.
